hooks.command: CMD=$(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/ (port map: graphify-out/port/). For architecture questions read graphify-out/port/GRAPH_REPORT.md or run python -m graphify query. After code edits run python -m graphify update ."}}'   || true ;; esac
